d2hr_e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_a.text: Word is spreading fast! Your reputation is drawing attention. A food blogger just walked in wanting to feature your shop. This could be huge!

d2hr_e1_b.speaker: Blogger
d2hr_e1_b.text: I heard amazing things about this place! I would love to do a full feature. Can I spend the morning here and interview you?

choices.text: Allow it but set some ground rules

d2hr_e1_c_welcome.speaker: Blogger
d2hr_e1_c_welcome.text: You are so open and genuine! This is exactly the kind of story my readers love. Your authenticity shines through everything here.

d2hr_e1_c_rules.speaker: Blogger
d2hr_e1_c_rules.text: That is completely fair! Setting boundaries shows professionalism. I respect that. Let us make this work for both of us.

d2hr_e1_c_approval.speaker: Blogger
d2hr_e1_c_approval.text: Smart thinking! Most business owners never ask that. I am happy to share the draft before publishing.

d2hr_e1_c_decline.speaker: Blogger
d2hr_e1_c_decline.text: Oh. Okay, I understand. Maybe another time then. I hope the shop continues to do well.

d2hr_e1_result_welcome.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_welcome.text: Openness builds powerful media relationships. Your reputation earned you this opportunity — now you are amplifying it further.

d2hr_e1_result_rules.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_rules.text: Setting boundaries with media is professional and smart. You protected your operations while still seizing the opportunity.

d2hr_e1_result_approval.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_approval.text: Requesting editorial control protects your brand. Never let others define your story without your input.

d2hr_e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_decline.text: Missed opportunities rarely come back. Your reputation opened this door but declining closed it. Balance busyness with growth.

d2hr_e2_a.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_a.text: Your growing reputation has attracted a premium supplier offering higher quality ingredients at a premium price. This could elevate your product significantly.

d2hr_e2_b.speaker: Supplier
d2hr_e2_b.text: We only work with shops that have a strong reputation. Yours qualifies. Our ingredients cost 40% more but your customers will taste the difference immediately.

choices.text: Use premium for signature items only

d2hr_e2_c_full.speaker: Customer
d2hr_e2_c_full.text: Oh wow this tastes completely different! So much richer. I am telling everyone about this upgrade!

d2hr_e2_c_partial.speaker: Customer
d2hr_e2_c_partial.text: The signature items taste incredible! The quality jump is noticeable. Worth every extra peso.

d2hr_e2_c_trial.speaker: Supplier
d2hr_e2_c_trial.text: A trial period is reasonable. Two weeks at reduced cost so you can measure customer response. Smart approach.

d2hr_e2_c_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_c_decline.text: Loyalty to your current setup is valid but premium opportunities at this stage are rare. Make sure you are not leaving growth on the table.

d2hr_e2_result_full.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_result_full.text: Premium positioning is a powerful strategy. Higher costs but higher perceived value — your reputation justifies the price increase.

d2hr_e2_result_partial.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_result_partial.text: Selective premiumization is smart business. Flagship products carry the brand while keeping costs manageable.

d2hr_e2_result_trial.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_result_trial.text: Data before commitment is always wise. A trial lets you measure real customer response before locking in higher costs.

d2hr_e2_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e2_result_decline.text: Comfort with the status quo can limit growth. Strong reputation creates leverage — use it while you have it.

d2hr_e3_a.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_a.text: End of a great day! A nearby business owner approaches wanting to collaborate on a joint promotion. Your reputation made you their first choice.

d2hr_e3_b.speaker: Business Owner
d2hr_e3_b.text: Your shop has the best reputation on this street. A joint promotion between our businesses could double both our customer bases. Interested?

choices.text: Decline — focus on your own brand

d2hr_e3_c_agree.speaker: Business Owner
d2hr_e3_c_agree.text: Fantastic! This partnership is going to be incredible. Our customers are going to love both of us even more.

d2hr_e3_c_details.speaker: Business Owner
d2hr_e3_c_details.text: Of course! Due diligence is important. Let me walk you through the full plan before we shake hands on anything.

d2hr_e3_c_pilot.speaker: Business Owner
d2hr_e3_c_pilot.text: A pilot is actually a brilliant idea. Test the waters before diving in. I like how you think.

d2hr_e3_c_decline.speaker: Business Owner
d2hr_e3_c_decline.text: I respect that. Building your own brand first is a solid strategy. The offer stands if you change your mind.

d2hr_e3_result_agree.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_agree.text: Strategic partnerships multiply reach. Your reputation attracted this opportunity — now it is compounding through collaboration.

d2hr_e3_result_details.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_details.text: Never commit without understanding the full picture. Asking for details before agreeing is professional and protects your interests.

d2hr_e3_result_pilot.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_pilot.text: Pilots reduce risk in partnerships. Testing compatibility before full commitment is one of the smartest moves in collaborative business.

d2hr_e3_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_decline.text: Brand focus is valid but partnerships can accelerate growth significantly. Make sure independence is a strategy not just comfort.
